mapper.select: SELECT item_id, item_name, item_img FROM items WHERE item_name Like CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY item_name ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fridge_item(user_id, item_id, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{itemId}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT item_id, item_name, item_img FROM items WHERE item_id = #{itemId}

SELECT item_id, item_name, item_img FROM items WHERE item_name IN
#{name}
SELECT i.item_name FROM fridge_item fi JOIN items i ON fi.item_id = i.item_id WHERE fi.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO fridge_item(user_id, item_id, created_at) VALUES
(#{userId}, #{itemId}, NOW())
